revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-5-135

Alternative term: Moment of inertia

The sum of the products of all the elementary areas of a section by the squares of the distances of these areas from an axis through the section.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Second moment of area}}
